title: Piloto sistema definitivo 1-act 8s · Pablo morning coffee
logline: Piloto E2E del sistema definitivo Dark Room. UNA acción evolutiva continua: Pablo entra a la cocina, agarra la cafetera, sirve café, mira por la ventana mientras toma el primer sorbo. Tier AUTHENTIC iPhone para test sin coste premium.

research.source: Wong Kar-Wai · In the Mood for Love 2000 · DP Christopher Doyle
research.data: 35mm low angle slight handheld con ralenti natural · captura intimacidad cotidiana

research.source: iPhone 15 Pro Max main camera native
research.data: Natural window light morning 9am · warm tungsten kitchen lamp fill · NO color grade applied

research.source: Saul Leiter street photography color sensibility
research.data: Muted warm earthtones · cream + olive + mocha · NO saturated

research.source: Pablo PACAME daily routine real (BTS reference)
research.data: Movimientos lentos meditativos · 8s contiene 4 micro-acciones encadenadas · cero stress

research.source: Foley library natural ambient kitchen morning
research.data: Coffee pot bubbling · ceramic mug placement · birds outside window · sip sound · zero music

character_anchor.body_descriptor_hardcoded: Spanish man late 30s/early 40s, athletic-stocky LEAN SLIM build, V-shape torso, short-cropped dark brown hair, well-groomed dark-brown beard with subtle gray hints, brown eyes, warm olive Mediterranean skin, defined cheekbones, lean sharp jawline, NOT bulky NOT chubby NOT round face.
character_anchor.wardrobe_single: Plain charcoal grey cotton t-shirt + light denim jeans · no accessories · no logo

sequence.narrative_arc: Single 8s morning ritual continuous shot · Pablo enters kitchen → grabs coffeepot → pours → first sip while looking at window. Mood: meditative, real, cotidiano.

wardrobe_continuity.description: Plain charcoal grey cotton t-shirt + light denim jeans throughout entire 8s

shots.title: MORNING COFFEE RITUAL
shots.subject_motion: Pablo walks 2 steps into kitchen frame-right (0-2s) · reaches with right hand to grab matte black coffeepot from counter (2-3.5s) · pours into ceramic mug slowly (3.5-5.5s) · turns body 30° toward window left while raising mug (5.5-7s) · takes first sip slowly with eyes half-closed (7-8s)
shots.camera_motion: Stable handheld iPhone 15 Pro Max main wide camera at hip height · subtle natural sway · slow drift-back from medium to medium-wide over 8s · no zoom
shots.lens_reference_hollywood: Christopher Doyle In The Mood For Love 2000 · low-angle handheld intimate cotidiano + iPhone 15 Pro Max native (NO cinematic LUT)

caption_text_ig: Mi ritual de cada mañana antes de empezar a generar. Cero música. Solo café y luz natural. ¿Cuál es el tuyo? Cuéntamelo en comentarios.

approval.approval_format_required: AUTHENTIC tier sin video premium · NO requiere doble SÍ
